sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Tesla는 2025 회계연도에 948억 2,700만 달러의 매출과 43억 5,500만 달러의 영업이익을 기록하며 AI 및 자율주행 기술 개발에 집중하고 있습니다.

keyPoints.text: AI 및 자율주행 기술(FSD, Robotaxi, Optimus) 개발을 위한 전략적 투자를 지속하고 있습니다.
R&D 비용이 2025년 6,411백만 달러로 전년 대비 1,871백만 달러(+41 %) 증가했습니다.
SG&A 비용은 5,834백만 달러로 전년 대비 684백만 달러(+13 %) 증가했습니다.

riskChanges.text: 글로벌 무역 및 재정 정책 변화로 인한 공급망 불확실성과 관세 체계가 수익성에 부정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.
자율주행 기술 및 신제품(Cybercab 등)의 개발 지연, 제조 비용 통제 실패, 그리고 제품 결함에 따른 리콜 및 법적 책임 위험이 존재합니다.

businessChanges.text: R&D 비용이 매출에서 차지하는 비중이 2024년 5 %에서 2025년 7 %로 확대되었습니다.
SG&A 비용 증가는 법적 비용 354백만 달러 증가 및 인건비 256백만 달러 증가가 주요 원인입니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2025 회계연도 매출은 948억 2,700만 달러, 영업이익은 43억 5,500만 달러를 기록했습니다.
순이익은 37억 9,400만 달러이며, 총자산 1,378억 600만 달러 중 현금 및 현금성 자산은 165억 1,300만 달러입니다.

watchItems.text: AI 및 로보틱스 분야에 대한 공격적인 R&D 지출이 향후 매출 성장과 수익성 개선으로 이어질지 여부가 핵심 관전 포인트입니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: FY2025 revenue = 948억 2,700만 달러 (USD 94.827B; 94,827 million), period ended 2025-12-31.
FY2025 operating income = 43억 5,500만 달러 (USD 4.355B; 4,355 million), period ended 2025-12-31.
FY2025 net income = 37억 9,400만 달러 (USD 3.794B; 3,794 million), period ended 2025-12-31.
FY2025 total assets = 1,378억 600만 달러 (USD 137.806B; 137,806 million), period ended 2025-12-31.
FY2025 cash and cash equivalents = 165억 1,300만 달러 (USD 16.513B; 16,513 million), period ended 2025-12-31.

Risks Related to Our Ability to Grow Our Business We may experience issues or delays in developing, launching and ramping the production of our products, services and features, or we may be unable to control our manufacturing costs. We are developing new technologies and services, unique manufacturing processes and design features in our products. There is no guarantee we will be able to successfully develop or timely introduce and scale these new products, services and features, or that there will be widespread consumer adoption. We also have previously experienced and may in the future experience launch and production ramp delays. In particular, our future business depends on development of our driver assistance systems and autonomous driving solutions and increasing the production of mass-market vehicles, including Cybercab, our purpose-built Robotaxi product. In order to be successfu

Our business may suffer if our products or features contain defects, fail to perform as expected or take longer than expected to become fully functional. If our products contain design or manufacturing defects, whether relating to our software or hardware, that cause them not to perform as designed or intended or that require repair, or certain features of our vehicles such as new driver 16 Table of Contents assistance features take longer than expected to become enabled, are legally restricted or become subject to onerous regulation, our ability to develop, market and sell our products and services may be harmed, and we may experience delivery delays, product recalls, allegations of product liability, breach of warranty and related consumer protection claims and significant warranty and other expenses. While we are continuously working to develop and improve our products’ capability and

Highlights We are focused on bringing artificial intelligence into the real world, through products and services like FSD (Supervised) and Robotaxi, as well as working to develop and commercialize AI robots (including Optimus). We intend to leverage our current operations, in which we design, develop, manufacture, sell and lease high-performance fully electric vehicles and energy generation and storage systems that increasingly deliver AI-related and enhanced software and services to our customers, to achieve that objective. As a result of rapidly evolving trade and fiscal policy, uncertainty in the automotive and energy markets continues, posing risks to our global supply chain and cost structure which could have a meaningfully adverse impact on demand for our products and our profitability.
